stemHtml:
Refer to figure Chart "E LO 1" from Jeppesen GSPRM 2017.
Find the true course for a flight from KIRKWALL (EGPA, N58°58' W002°54') / KOKAL intersection to ABERDEEN (ADN, N57°19' W0002°16').

options.a: Via airway N560, track 198°, to WIK, then via airway Y904, track 164°, to ADN.
options.b: Via airway N560, track 192°, to WIK, then via airway Y904, track 158°, to ADN.
options.c: Via airway N560, track 195°, to WIK, then via airway Y904, track 161°, to ADN.
options.d: Via airway N560, track 193°, to WIK, then via airway Y904, track 159°, to ADN.
